items.statcast_observation: Jac Caglianone produced the hardest tracked Royals contact: 110.4 mph at a 5.0 degree launch angle.
items.summary: The Royals lost to the Texas Rangers, KC 3, TEX 6. Michael Massey led the night, 2-3 | HR, BB, K in the latest Royals game. Jac Caglianone supplied the loudest Royals contact at 110.4 mph.
items.title: Royals at Rangers Recap
